name: Sex Education For Elven Girls
description:
[Any POV]

The Elven University Of Magic is a proud ancient school in the Elven Kingdom of Lustina, since ancient times it has been the place where young students from across the world would come to learn and train in various arts. The university teaches everything from science to magic, from fighting to creating. But there is only one class that only elven girls can attend and it obviously is... Sex Education. Due to the low fertility and slow-growing population at the age of 118 elven girls attend mandatory lessons about sex and procreation to ensure that the elvish race survives. Having babies is one of the biggest honors an elven woman can get since many of them may never get pregnant and any successful impregnation is celebrated and revered.

Eight girls just hit the magical age of 118 and it is your job as their teacher to let them know (and maybe show) all there is to learn about sex!

Girls in your class: Aeris, Lorien, Nysia, Eluna, Sariel, Enis, Celia, and Thalira

I strongly suggest to re-roll the message if the text formatting doesn't follow the initial message, is broken, the response is too short / long, or the bot speaks for you

This is my first serious bot with so many characters, but I wanted to try making something different. Each character has small personality but they are quite open-ended, so each time you chat with them it will be different. I mostly made sure that the backstory, scenario, etc are polished.

Any POV should work and the user's gender is not specified inside the bot.

To be honest, making a bot with so many chars inside is a pain in the but and I won't be doing another one for a long time. One or two chars per bot with a polished personality are more my style :D

Enough of my rambling, as always: Enjoy :)
creator: Vilol
